title: AFIX Governance Hop Record
description: Append-only governance record for a single delegation hop in a multi-agent chain. One GHR per hop, hash-linked to form a tamper-evident chain. Correlation key: actor_lei:chain_id:hop_index.

chain.description: Chain integrity fields — uniquely identify this hop within the governance chain

actor_lei.description: ISO 17442 Legal Entity Identifier of the institution acting at this hop (required)

hop_index.description: Zero-based position of this hop in the delegation chain (0 = originator)

parent_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the preceding GHR. Null for hop_index 0 (originator). Forms tamper-evident chain.

chain_id.description: Immutable chain correlation ID assigned at origination, analogous to SWIFT UETR. Carried unchanged across all hops.

total_hops.description: Current chain length at the time this GHR was created. Updated at each delegation.

model.description: Liability model governing this hop. Set at chain origination and carried forward.

attestation.description: Machine-readable liability acceptance statement for this hop

governance_cert.description: URI to this institution's governance certification (ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, or equivalent)

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes for applicable regulatory jurisdictions at this hop

compliance_event.description: Governance audit record for this hop's delegation action

actor.description: Agent identity of the delegating actor at this hop

action.description: Governance action class — from the AFIX action-risk taxonomy

target.description: Resource or agent that is the target of the delegated action

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of this delegation event

authority_basis.description: Reference to the authorization that permits this delegation (policy URI, entitlement grant ID, or bilateral agreement reference)

outcome.description: Current outcome status of this hop. Mutable — updated as the hop progresses. The chain itself is append-only.

compensation.description: Compensation definition — what happens if this hop fails

type.description: Compensation mechanism to invoke on failure at this hop

handler.description: URI to the Agent Card of the agent capable of executing the compensation action

timeout.description: ISO 8601 duration string defining the window within which compensation is possible (e.g., PT30M for 30 minutes)

conditions.description: Machine-readable conditions that trigger compensation at this hop
